name: Addition Financial Credit Union - Lake Mary
description_short: Addition Financial Credit Union operates 25+ branches across Central Florida, including Lake Mary, offering members deposit accounts, ATM access, and basic financial services with federal NCUA insurance protection.
description_long:
Addition Financial Credit Union is a federally insured credit union serving the Central Florida region with over 25 branch locations. The Lake Mary branch is located at 1000 Primera Boulevard and operates with extended drive-thru hours (8 AM to 6 PM most days) to accommodate member schedules. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Addition Financial emphasizes member ownership and community focus, with routing number 263181384 for electronic transactions.

The Lake Mary location provides comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, safe deposit boxes, notary services, coin counting, and debit card instant issue capabilities. Members can access funds through multiple channels: the physical branch, drive-thru window, 24-hour ATMs at the branch, Presto! ATMs at Publix locations throughout the Southeast (with no surcharge for Addition Financial debit cards), and the CO-OP Shared Branch Network comprising 5,000+ locations nationwide. The branch also offers money orders, official checks, U.S. Savings Bond redemption, and loan payment processing.

Addition Financial distinguishes itself through its shared branch network, allowing members traveling or relocating within the U.S. to access banking services at partner locations. The Presto! ATM partnership with Publix supermarkets provides convenient fee-free cash access across the Southeast. The branch offers an ATM + Live Teller hybrid service at select locations, combining 24-hour automated access with personalized teller assistance. Online appointment scheduling and multiple contact methods (phone, toll-free, email) enhance accessibility.

As a credit union, Addition Financial members benefit from federal NCUA insurance protection on deposits. However, the website provided does not detail loan products, interest rates, fee structures, or membership eligibility requirements. The Lake Mary branch has limited lobby hours (9-5 on most weekdays, closed Saturdays) and Thursday morning operations don't begin until 10 AM, which may inconvenience some members despite extended drive-thru availability. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 1000 Primera Blvd Entrance, Lake Mary, FL 32746

company_info.headquarters: 1000 Primera Blvd Entrance, Lake Mary, FL 32746

pros: Federally insured by NCUA, providing deposit protection up to $250,000 per account category
Extended drive-thru hours (8 AM-6 PM most days, 8 AM-3 PM Saturday) for convenient after-hours banking
Free ATM access at 5,000+ CO-OP Shared Branch locations nationwide for traveling members
Fee-free Presto! ATMs at Publix supermarkets throughout the Southeast via debit card
Instant debit card issuance available at the branch for immediate card activation
24-hour branch ATM access for deposits, withdrawals, balance inquiries, and transfers
Hybrid ATM + Live Teller service at select branches combining automation with personal assistance
cons: Limited lobby hours (9-5 weekdays, closed Saturdays) restrict in-person appointment availability during evenings and weekends
Website does not disclose loan products, interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
No information provided about membership eligibility requirements or account minimum balances
Limited branch network (25+ locations) may not serve all Central Florida residents compared to national banks
Thursday branch opens at 10 AM instead of 9 AM, creating scheduling inconsistency
best_for: Central Florida residents seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts with extended drive-thru accessibility
Members who travel frequently within the U.S. and need nationwide shared branch access
Publix shoppers wanting fee-free ATM access integrated into regular grocery shopping
Individuals prioritizing credit union membership structure and community-focused banking
diagnosis: Best for Central Florida residents seeking a federally insured credit union with convenient drive-thru banking and nationwide ATM access. Primary caveat: the website lacks critical information about loan products, rates, fees, and membership requirements needed to evaluate this institution as a complete financial services provider.
services: 24-hour ATM access (balance inquiries, deposits, withdrawals, transfers)
CO-OP Shared Branch Network access (5,000+ locations)
Presto! ATM access at Publix locations (fee-free with Addition Financial debit card)
